<!-- Thanks for the PR! A few quick checks before you hit "Create": -->

## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences describing what changed and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (parses correctly, fixture didn't before)
- [ ] New feature (new edit format, new option, new helper)
- [ ] Breaking change (API surface changed)
- [ ] Internal refactor / chore (no behavior change)
- [ ] Docs / examples / CI only

## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` passes
- [ ] I added or updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] I added a changeset (`bun run changeset`) if this should ship to npm
- [ ] I updated the README / recipe / example if user-visible behavior changed

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that would help review: tricky edge cases, links to upstream aider behavior,
benchmark numbers, etc. Delete this section if there's nothing to add. -->
